.cargo/.purpose: verify cargo configuration is parseable and local

.config/.purpose: verify local tool configuration remains parseable

.github/.command: just fast && just check && just score
.github/.purpose: verify hosted workflows stay thin, pinned, and audit-visible

.jankurai/.purpose: verify committed audit evidence matches the pinned Jankurai lane

AGENTS.md.purpose: verify split metadata and agent maps

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify release notes stay routed through the score lane

Justfile.command: just fast && just check && just score
Justfile.purpose: verify local command wrappers remain canonical

VERSION.purpose: verify version source remains aligned with release evidence

agent/.purpose: verify agent metadata parses and routes proof lanes

apps/web/.command: just check && just e2e && npm --workspace @jeryu/web run ux-qa
apps/web/.purpose: verify jeryu-web source, the Playwright action matrix, and rendered UX-QA coverage

apps/web/e2e/.purpose: verify the Playwright action matrix, mocked Chromium browser workflows, and e2e artifacts

contracts/AGENTS.md.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

contracts/generated/.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

deny.toml.purpose: verify security policy metadata remains parseable

docs/.purpose: verify agent-readable docs remain routed and auditable

ops/ci/.command: just fast && just check && just score
ops/ci/.purpose: verify local CI wrappers are reproducible and audit-visible

ops/git-hooks/.command: just fast && just check && just score
ops/git-hooks/.purpose: verify pre-push gates delegate to local CI lanes

package.json.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

packages/ux-qa/.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

repos.manifest.toml.purpose: verify split manifest remains parseable and routed

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify local Rust toolchain metadata remains pinned

scripts/.purpose: verify helper scripts parse and stay locally reproducible

tests/.purpose: verify negative proof evidence remains routed

tsconfig.json.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

ux-qa/.purpose: verify jeryu-web owned source remains build-addressable

db/.purpose: verify documented data boundary policy remains routed

ops/.command: just fast && just check && just score
ops/.purpose: verify local ops guidance and CI wrappers stay reproducible
